titleStmt.title: SII 30.243: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 243. (A.R. No. 594 of 1915.) Sāyāmalai, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Umaiyorupāgīsvara temple-On the west wall of the central shrine Jaṭ. Aḻagaṉ alias Ativīrarāmaṉ alias Sīvaladeva: Year 15, Śaka 1500, Iswara, Vaikasi: 1578 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the shepherd families including one of Irāsakularāmakkōṉ entrusted with the responsibility of maintaining cows and paying tax in terms of ghee for burning lamps and providing milk and curd on kārttigai and śivarātri days every year to the temple of Umaiyorupāgīsvaramuḍaiya-nāyanār at Sāyamalai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakāttam 1000 5 100 l ciṟikoccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiṟīpuvaṉacakkiravatti koneṉrimai koṇṭāṉ ciṟīnāḷ Aḻakaṉṉāṉa Ativirarāmaṉāṉa civalatevaṟku Āṇṭu 10 5 vatu Iccura varuṣam vaikāci
cāyamalai nayiṉār Umaiorupākicuramuṭaiyanayiṉāṟku nāḷ Aḻakiya cokkaṉār pirāmavaratuṅkarāma ṭutta teyvatāṉa kuṭiyāvatu meṟpaṭiyūr Iṉṉāyaṉār Irācakularāmakkoṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār perāl
Uṇṭāṉa kaṟavai kāṇappacu mākāṇippacuvum Iṉṉāḷ mutal cantirātittavaraikku Inta mākāṇip pacuvukkuṇṭāṉa Iṟaimuṟaimai yeṟpeyppaṭṭatu varuṣantoṟum kuṭuttut tirukkāttikai civarāttiri Ippaṭi Uṇ
(ṭāṇa)ṭāṉa tīpaṅkaḷum Uṇṭāna neyyamutu pālamutu tayiramutu naṭatti Appaṭiye nayiṉārkuṭiyākac caṟuvamāka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭut tiruvuḷam paṟṟi tirumukam tiruvuḷam paṟṟiyaruḷiṉapaṭikku kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koṭuttom Ippaṭiye naṭattivaravum .
Digital edition of SII 30.243 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
